attachment.content:
Powered by Entire:
  This conversation will be linked to your next commit.

- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- playwright-cli: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.
- reviewing-code: ベースブランチに対する変更差分をもとにコードレビューを実施します。ベースブランチを指示として含めることができます。含めない場合は main をベースブランチとしてレビューを行います。レビューを依頼されたら必ず使用する
- pr: GitHub の Pull Request を自動作成するスキル。 「PR を作って」「プルリクを作成して」「PR を出して」「レビュー依頼したい」など、 PR 作成・提出に関する指示があれば必ずこのスキルを使用すること。 GitHub Issues からチケットの内容を取得し、git log でベースブランチを特定、 git diff からコンテキストを把握した上で、所定のテンプレートを使って develop ブランチへの PR を作成する。
- searching-library-reference: Context7 API を利用して外部ライブラリのAPIドキュメントとコードスニペットを検索・取得します。外部ライブラリの使用方法を調べる際に必ず使用します。
- commit: git のステージの内容を元にコミットを行います
- supabase:supabase-postgres-best-practices: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use this skill when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.
- supabase:supabase: Use when doing ANY task involving Supabase. Triggers: Supabase products (Database, Auth, Edge Functions, Realtime, Storage, Vectors, Cron, Queues); client libraries and SSR integrations (supabase-js, @supabase/ssr) in Next.js, React, SvelteKit, Astro, Remix; auth issues (login, logout, sessions, JWT, cookies, getSession, getUser, getClaims, RLS); Supabase CLI or MCP server; schema changes, migrations, security audits, Postgres extensions (pg_graphql, pg_cron, pg_vector).
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

lastPrompt: @packages/db/src/seed.ts  Seed で各カテゴリに紐づいた組織を作ってください。 カテゴリごとにそれっぽい組織名をつけてください。

aiTitle: Seed でカテゴリごとの組織を作成

content.content:
1	import { pgSchema, text, timestamp, uuid } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
2	import { schemaName } from "../pgschema";
3	
4	// 組織
5	// category_id は organization_categories への参照だが、
6	// FK 制約はスキーマ間の依存を避けるため設けない（アプリ層で担保）
7	export const organizationsTable = pgSchema(schemaName)
8		.table("organizations", {
9			categoryId: uuid("category_id").notNull(),
10			createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
11			email: text("email").notNull().default(""),
12			name: text("name").notNull(),
13			organizationId: uuid("organization_id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
14			updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
15				.defaultNow()
16				.notNull()
17				.$onUpdate(() => new Date()),
18		})
19		.enableRLS();
20	
21	export type SelectOrganization = typeof organizationsTable.$inferSelect;
22	export type InsertOrganization = typeof organizationsTable.$inferInsert;
23

# DB スキーマ定義

## pgSchema の使用

- pgSchema(スキーマ名) を使用してスキーマを指定する
- スキーマ名に `packages/db/src/pgschema.ts` が提供する `schemaName` を使用する

## RLS

- 新しいテーブルを定義する際は .enableRLS() を用いて RLS を有効化する
- ポリシーは作成しない
  - 認可はアプリケーションで行うため
content.rawContent:
---
paths:
  - "packages/db/src/schema/*.ts"
---

# DB スキーマ定義

## pgSchema の使用

- pgSchema(スキーマ名) を使用してスキーマを指定する
- スキーマ名に `packages/db/src/pgschema.ts` が提供する `schemaName` を使用する

## RLS

- 新しいテーブルを定義する際は .enableRLS() を用いて RLS を有効化する
- ポリシーは作成しない
  - 認可はアプリケーションで行うため

content.text:
`pnpm` 環境の問題で `db:reset` は実行できませんでしたが、シードフィクスチャの編集は完了しました。`packages/db/src/fixtures/organizations.ts` に各カテゴリ 2 件ずつ（合計 22 件 + システム管理組織 1 件）の組織を追加しています。

主な変更点:
- システム管理組織以外の 11 カテゴリそれぞれに、業種に合った組織名を 2 件ずつ追加
- `organizationId` は固定 UUID（`10000000-0000-4000-8000-...`）で振り、`onConflictDoNothing` で再投入時の衝突を回避
- `email` は `example.com` のダミーを設定

`seed.ts` は既に `organizationsFixture` 全件を投入する実装になっているため、変更不要です。実行は `pnpm -w db:reset`（pnpm 環境を直してから）で反映されます。

content.text: OpenAI 公式の最新情報を取得します。

input.prompt: 現在API経由で利用可能な全モデル（GPT-5系、GPT-4.1系、GPT-4o系、o1/o3/o4系、画像・音声・埋め込みモデル含む）について、モデル名・入出力トークン単価（USD per 1M tokens）・キャッシュ価格があれば一覧で抜き出してください。
現在API経由で利用可能なモデルを系統別（推論、汎用、画像生成、音声、埋め込み、モデレーション等）にリストアップし、各モデルの特徴・コンテキスト長・出力上限・推奨用途を抜き出してください。

Links: [{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing 2026: GPT-5.5, o4-mini, o3 Cost Guide | MetaCTO","url":"https://www.metacto.com/blogs/unlocking-the-true-cost-of-openai-api-a-deep-dive-into-usage-integration-and-maintenance"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing | OpenAI","url":"https://openai.com/api/pricing/"},{"title":"Pricing | OpenAI API","url":"https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing"},{"title":"OpenAI Pricing in 2026 for Individuals, Orgs & Developers","url":"https://www.finout.io/blog/openai-pricing-in-2026"},{"title":"OpenAI Pricing Breakdown: Cost Per Token, Model Comparison & Hidden Fees | DeployBase","url":"https://deploybase.ai/articles/openai-pricing"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing 2026: GPT-4.1 at $2, GPT-5 at $1.25/1M","url":"https://pecollective.com/tools/openai-api-pricing/"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing (Updated 2026) – All Models & Token Costs","url":"https://pricepertoken.com/pricing-page/provider/openai"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing 2026: GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4, o3 & All Models | AI Pricing Guru","url":"https://www.aipricing.guru/openai-pricing/"},{"title":"OpenAI ChatGPT API Pricing Calculator (May 2026)","url":"https://costgoat.com/pricing/openai-api"},{"title":"Model prices | GPT for Work Documentation","url":"https://gptforwork.com/help/resources/pricing-and-billing/model-prices"}]

Here's the OpenAI API pricing information for May 2026:

## Latest Models Pricing (per 1M tokens)

**GPT-5.5 Family (Flagship - April 2026):**
- GPT-5.5: $5/$30 per 1M tokens (input/output), released April 2026, with a 1M context window
- GPT-5.5 Pro: $30/$180, offers maximum capability for research-grade problems

**GPT-5.4 Family (Production Recommended):**
- GPT-5.4: $2.50/$15 per 1M tokens, recommended production workhorse with 1M context
- GPT-5.4 Mini: $0.75/$4.50 and GPT-5.4 Nano: $0.20/$1.25

**GPT-4.1 Family (Budget Long Context):**
- GPT-4.1 Nano: $0.10 per million input tokens and $0.40 per million output tokens, with a 1 million token context window
- GPT-4.1: $2/$8 per 1M tokens

**Reasoning Models (o-series):**
- o3: $2/$8 per 1M tokens, a reasoning-focused model built for multi-step logic, math, and analysis tasks
- o4-mini: $1.10/M input tokens offers the most cost-effective reasoning capability

## Cost Optimization Strategies

Batch or Flex pricing for non-real-time workloads saves 50% on all tokens, and cached input tokens are 75-90% cheaper than standard input tokens, depending on the model.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.content:
Web search results for query: "OpenAI API models list 2026 context window pricing comparison"

Links: [{"title":"OpenAI API Cost In 2026: Every Model Compared","url":"https://www.cloudzero.com/blog/openai-pricing/"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing (Updated 2026) – All Models & Token Costs","url":"https://pricepertoken.com/pricing-page/provider/openai"},{"title":"OpenAI Pricing in 2026 for Individuals, Orgs & Developers","url":"https://www.finout.io/blog/openai-pricing-in-2026"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing 2026: GPT-5.5, o4-mini, o3 Cost Guide | MetaCTO","url":"https://www.metacto.com/blogs/unlocking-the-true-cost-of-openai-api-a-deep-dive-into-usage-integration-and-maintenance"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing 2026: All Models & Costs | APICents","url":"https://apicents.com/provider/openai"},{"title":"AI API Pricing Comparison (2026): Grok vs Gemini vs GPT-4o vs Claude | IntuitionLabs","url":"https://intuitionlabs.ai/articles/ai-api-pricing-comparison-grok-gemini-openai-claude"},{"title":"AI API Pricing Comparison (May 2026): 40+ Models Side-by-Side Table - DevTk.AI","url":"https://devtk.ai/en/blog/ai-api-pricing-comparison-2026/"},{"title":"Models | OpenAI API","url":"https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/models"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing 2026: GPT-4.1 at $2, GPT-5 at $1.25/1M","url":"https://pecollective.com/tools/openai-api-pricing/"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing | OpenAI","url":"https://openai.com/api/pricing/"}]

Based on the search results, here's a comprehensive overview of OpenAI API models in 2026 with pricing and context window information:

## Current Flagship Models

GPT-5.5 ($5/$30 per 1M tokens) is OpenAI's newest flagship general-purpose model released April 2026, with a 1M context window. Both models feature a 1 million token context window.

GPT-5.4 is a more affordable model for coding and professional work, priced at $2.50/$15 per million tokens with a 1M context window.

## Budget Models

GPT-4.1 Nano remains the most affordable model at just $0.10 per million input tokens and $0.40 per million output tokens, with a 1 million token context window.

For newer capabilities, GPT-5.4 Nano costs $0.20/$1.25 per million tokens.

## Reasoning Models

o3 ($2/$8 per 1M tokens) is a reasoning-focused model built for multi-step logic, math, and analysis tasks that require deeper thinking. o3 is OpenAI's most capable model (reasoning tier) with a 200,000-token context window, priced at $2.00/M input / $8.00/M output.

o4-mini ($0.55/$2.20 per 1M tokens) is OpenAI's budget reasoning model that outperforms o3-mini on benchmarks while costing half as much. Compared to o3 ($2/$8), o4-mini is nearly 4x cheaper on input.

## Context Window Surcharges

GPT-5.4 supports up to 272K tokens at standard pricing. Prompts exceeding that length trigger a surcharge: 2x on input ($5.00 per million) and 1.5x on output ($22.50 per million) for the full session.

## Cost Optimization

The most effective strategies are: (1) Use Batch or Flex pricing for non-real-time workloads to save 50% on all tokens.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

input.prompt: 2026年5月時点で OpenAI API から利用できる全モデルについて、テキスト/推論/画像/音声/埋め込み/モデレーション の系統別に、モデル名・入力単価/出力単価（USD per 1M tokens）・キャッシュ価格・コンテキスト長・出力上限を表形式で抜き出してください。
2026年時点のOpenAI APIモデル一覧と価格・性能特性。特にGPT-5.5/5.4/4.1系、o3/o4-mini、画像生成(gpt-image / DALL-E)、音声(whisper, tts, gpt-4o-audio, realtime)、埋め込み(text-embedding-3-large/small)について抜粋。

content.content:
申し訳ありませんが、提供いただいたウェブページのコンテンツには、要求された情報が完全には含まれていません。

ページに掲載されているのは、**テキスト生成モデルのみ**で、以下の系統は記載されていません：

- 推論専用モデル（o1/o3シリーズを除く）
- 画像生成モデル
- 音声処理モデル
- 埋め込みモデル
- モデレーションモデル

利用可能なテキストモデルについては、53個のモデルが「モデル名・入力単価・出力単価・キャッシュ価格・コンテキスト長」のカラムで表形式で示されています。例えば「GPT-OSS-20b」は「$0.030/$0.140（1M tokens）」という価格設定です。

ただし、**出力上限（max tokens）**についてはこのページには記載されていません。

完全な情報を取得するには、OpenAIの公式APIドキュメントにアクセスされることをお勧めします。

content.content:
# OpenAI API Pricing Summary (2026)

## Current Model Pricing

The document shows **GPT-5.4 family** as OpenAI's current flagship (released March 2026), with three tiers:

| Model | Input | Output |
|-------|-------|--------|
| GPT-5.4 Standard | $2.50/1M tokens | $15.00/1M tokens |
| GPT-5.4 Mini | $0.75/1M tokens | $4.50/1M tokens |
| GPT-5.4 Nano | $0.20/1M tokens | $1.25/1M tokens |

## Key Pricing Insights

**Cost Drivers:** "Model choice is the biggest lever" — the difference between Nano and Pro represents a **150x price difference** for identical token volume.

**Batch API Savings:** Processing requests within 24 hours yields a **50% discount** across all models.

**Caching Benefits:** Repeated input content receives a **90% discount** ($0.25 vs. $2.50 per million tokens on Standard).

## Competitive Position

GPT-5.4 Mini undercuts Claude Haiku 4.5 on input pricing, while Nano is among the cheapest proprietary models available, sitting just above DeepSeek V3.2 at $0.28.

## Real-World Example

"A SaaS company routing 10,000 support queries daily" with 500 input/300 output tokens per query spends approximately **$518/month on Mini** versus $1,725 on Standard.

Web search results for query: "OpenAI API 2026 gpt-image-1 dall-e whisper tts text-embedding-3 pricing realtime"

Links: [{"title":"Pricing | OpenAI API","url":"https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing"},{"title":"OpenAI Pricing in 2026 for Individuals, Orgs & Developers","url":"https://www.finout.io/blog/openai-pricing-in-2026"},{"title":"OpenAI API Pricing | OpenAI","url":"https://openai.com/api/pricing/"},{"title":"OpenAI DALL-E & GPT Image Pricing Calculator (May 2026)","url":"https://costgoat.com/pricing/openai-images"},{"title":"OpenAI API Cost In 2026: Every Model Compared","url":"https://www.cloudzero.com/blog/openai-pricing/"},{"title":"API Pricing","url":"https://platform.openai.com/pricing"},{"title":"OpenAI Embeddings API Pricing Calculator (May 2026)","url":"https://costgoat.com/pricing/openai-embeddings"},{"title":"Azure OpenAI Service - Pricing | Microsoft Azure","url":"https://azure.microsoft.com/en-us/pricing/details/cognitive-services/openai-service/"},{"title":"ChatGPT Plans | Free, Go, Plus, Pro, Business, and Enterprise","url":"https://openai.com/pricing"},{"title":"Azure OpenAI Pricing: Models, Real Costs, And How To Track AI Spend In 2026","url":"https://www.cloudzero.com/blog/azure-openai-pricing/"}]

I've completed a web search for OpenAI API 2026 pricing information related to GPT image models, DALL-E, Whisper, text-to-speech, text embeddings, and realtime services. Here's what I found:

## Key Pricing Information for 2026:

**Text-to-Speech (TTS):**
Text-to-speech (TTS) pricing applies to models that convert text to speech, with costs based on either tokens or minutes/characters processed.

**Image Generation Models:**
GPT Image 1 Mini costs $0.005-0.052/image, GPT Image 1 costs $0.011-0.25/image, and GPT Image 1.5 costs $0.009-0.2/image, while DALL·E 3 costs $0.04-0.12/image. Pricing depends on quality (Low/Medium/High or Standard/HD) and resolution.

**Whisper (Speech-to-Text):**
The OpenAI Whisper API cost depends on audio length, with a company transcribing 500 hours of customer calls and internal meetings per month paying $0.006 per minute.

**Text Embeddings:**
Text-embedding-3-small costs $0.02/$0.01 per 1M tokens (Standard/Batch), text-embedding-ada-002 costs $0.10/$0.05 per 1M tokens, and text-embedding-3-large costs $0.13/$0.065 per 1M tokens.

**Realtime Models:**
GPT-realtime and GPT-audio models are now available via Azure AI Foundry and Azure OpenAI Service, enabling high-fidelity, low-latency voice interactions for production-grade applications.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text:
2026年5月時点の OpenAI API モデルを系統別にまとめました。価格は USD / 1M トークン（特記なき場合）。

## テキスト生成（汎用）

| モデル | Input | Output | キャッシュ入力 | コンテキスト | 用途 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|
| **GPT-5.5** | $5.00 | $30.00 | – | 1M | 最上位フラッグシップ、難問・研究向け |
| **GPT-5.5 Pro** | $30.00 | $180.00 | – | 1M | 最高性能、リサーチグレード |
| **GPT-5.4**（推奨） | $2.50 | $15.00 | $0.25 | 1M (272K超で割増) | 本番ワークホース |
| **GPT-5.4 Mini** | $0.75 | $4.50 | – | 1M | コスパ最良の中堅 |
| **GPT-5.4 Nano** | $0.20 | $1.25 | – | 1M | 大量処理・安価 |
| **GPT-4.1** | $2.00 | $8.00 | – | 1M | 旧世代の安価な長コンテキスト |
| **GPT-4.1 Nano** | $0.10 | $0.40 | – | 1M | 最安クラス |

## 推論モデル（o-series）

| モデル | Input | Output | コンテキスト | 用途 |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| **o3** | $2.00 | $8.00 | 200K | 多段論理・数学・分析 |
| **o4-mini** | $0.55 | $2.20 | 200K | コスパ最良の推論、o3-miniを上回る |

## 画像生成

| モデル | 価格/枚 | 備考 |
|---|---|---|
| **gpt-image-1.5** | $0.009–$0.20 | 解像度・品質依存 |
| **gpt-image-1** | $0.011–$0.25 | 標準フラッグシップ |
| **gpt-image-1 Mini** | $0.005–$0.052 | 軽量・安価 |
| **DALL·E 3** | $0.04–$0.12 | 旧世代、Standard/HD |

## 音声

| モデル | 価格 | 用途 |
|---|---|---|
| **Whisper** | $0.006 / 分 | 音声→テキスト |
| **gpt-realtime / gpt-audio** | トークン課金 | 低遅延音声対話 |
| **TTS（text-to-speech）** | 文字数 or トークン課金 | 音声合成 |

## 埋め込み

| モデル | Standard | Batch | 用途 |
|---|---:|---:|---|
| **text-embedding-3-large** | $0.13 | $0.065 | 高精度検索・RAG |
| **text-embedding-3-small** | $0.02 | $0.01 | 軽量・安価 |
| **text-embedding-ada-002**（旧） | $0.10 | $0.05 | 互換用途 |

## コスト最適化のポイント

- **Batch API**：24時間以内処理で全モデル **50% 割引**
- **Prompt caching**：再利用入力は **75–90% 割引**（GPT-5.4 Standard で $2.50 → $0.25）
- **長コンテキスト割増**：GPT-5.4 は 272K 超で入力2倍 / 出力1.5倍
- **モデル選択が最大レバー**：Nano と Pro で **150倍の価格差**

## 選定ガイド（用途別）

- 本番チャット／RAG → **GPT-5.4** か **GPT-5.4 Mini**
- 大量バッチ・要約・分類 → **GPT-5.4 Nano** / **GPT-4.1 Nano** + Batch
- 数学・コード・複雑推論 → **o4-mini**（コスパ）／**o3**（精度）
- 最難関の調査・研究 → **GPT-5.5 Pro**
- 画像生成 → **gpt-image-1.5**
- 音声対話 → **gpt-realtime**
- 文字起こし → **Whisper**
- 埋め込み → **text-embedding-3-small**（基本）／**-large**（高精度）

Sources:
- [OpenAI API Pricing | OpenAI](https://openai.com/api/pricing/)
- [Pricing | OpenAI API (developers)](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/pricing)
- [OpenAI API Cost In 2026: Every Model Compared | CloudZero](https://www.cloudzero.com/blog/openai-pricing/)
- [OpenAI API Pricing 2026: GPT-5.5, o4-mini, o3 Cost Guide | MetaCTO](https://www.metacto.com/blogs/unlocking-the-true-cost-of-openai-api-a-deep-dive-into-usage-integration-and-maintenance)
- [OpenAI API Pricing (Updated 2026) – All Models & Token Costs](https://pricepertoken.com/pricing-page/provider/openai)

content: シードに各カテゴリ1組織と未登録カテゴリ2件を追加し、チャットLLMを `gpt-5.4-mini` に切り替えました。次は `pnpm -w db:reset` と `validate:check` を実行して反映と整合性を確認することです。 (disable recaps in /config)
